message:
feat(fsqlite-core): add commit repair module for crash recovery

- lib.rs: add commit_repair module declaration
- commit_repair.rs (new): implement the crash-recovery commit repair
  protocol that detects and repairs partially-written transactions by
  examining WAL frame checksums, replaying valid frames, and truncating
  corrupted tail frames

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
